description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on release creation. The workflow should have two jobs: pack and release. The pack job runs on ubuntu-latest, clones the repository with submodules, creates a source tarball, and uploads it. The release job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04 with amd64 architecture, clones the repository, installs dependencies, builds the project with custom cmake defines, and uploads the build artifacts.
